title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Highstreet Group Limited
body: "Application number 5108  Applicant High Street TV (Group) Limited objected to the name used by Highstreet Group Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 12 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Highstreet Group Limited is changed to 15717795, Ltd. "
